2016-T3-P1-S2.trunk: 倒装引语 + 让步句：Wrote Milton Friedman 「…」；But even if you accept …, things may not be absolutely clear-cut
structure: 倒装句①：Wrote Milton Friedman, a Nobel Prize-winning economist: 「…」（= Milton Friedman wrote: 「…」）
句②（But even if…）：But even if you accept Friedman's premise and regard CSR policies as a waste of shareholders' money, things may not be absolutely clear-cut
├ 让步状语从句(even if)：even if you accept … and regard … as …
│   └ 并列谓语：accept Friedman's premise / regard CSR policies as a waste…（regard A as B）
└ 主句：things may not be absolutely clear-cut
2016-T3-P1-S2.logic: ① Wrote + 主语 倒装（引语提示语）；② even if 引导让步状语从句（其内并列谓语 accept… and regard A as B），主句 things may not be clear-cut。
notes: Wrote Milton Friedman…：引语提示语的倒装（= Milton Friedman wrote）；a Nobel Prize-winning economist 同位语。
even if 引导让步状语从句；从句内并列谓语 accept… and regard A as B（把 A 视为 B）。
（原文 shareholders's 应为 shareholders'，clear-act 应为 clear-cut 明确的）。

2016-T3-P3-S2.trunk: S+V+O：Their analysis ruled out the possibility that …（他们的分析排除了…的可能）
structure: 主句：Their analysis ruled out the possibility …
└ 同位语从句〔that，说明 possibility〕：that it was firm's political influence, rather than their CSR stand, that accounted for the leniency
├ 强调句：it was … that …（强调 firm's political influence）
└ 插入对比：rather than their CSR stand
冒号后（证据）：Companies that contributed more to political campaigns did not receive lower fines
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 Companies〕：that contributed more to political campaigns
2016-T3-P3-S2.logic: 主句 ruled out the possibility；that 同位语从句说明 possibility，其内是强调句 it was X that…（强调 political influence，rather than CSR 插入对比）；冒号引出证据，that 定语从句修饰 Companies。
notes: the possibility that…：that 同位语从句说明 possibility（不是定语从句）。
同位语从句内是强调句 it was … that …（强调 firm's political influence，而非 CSR stand）。
冒号后 Companies that…：that 定语从句修饰 Companies（捐得多的公司并未获更低罚款）。

2016-T3-P3-S4.trunk: 引语(estimate that…)+倒装提示语：「We estimate that … result in fines …」 says one researcher
structure: 引语：We estimate that either eliminating … or increasing corporate giving by about 20% result in fines …
└ 宾语从句(that)：either eliminating … or increasing … result in fines …
├ either…or… 并列动名词主语：either eliminating a substantial labour-rights concern … or increasing corporate giving by about 20%
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 fines〕：that generally are 40% lower than the typical punishment for bribing foreign officials（比较级）
倒装提示语：says one researcher（= one researcher says）
2016-T3-P3-S4.logic: estimate that…（宾语从句）；从句主语是 either…or… 并列动名词（消除…或增加…），谓语 result in fines；that 定语从句修饰 fines（比…低40%）；says one researcher 倒装。
notes: either eliminating… or increasing… 是 that 从句的并列动名词主语；谓语 result in（按原文）。
fines that generally are 40% lower than…：that 定语从句修饰 fines + 比较级。
says one researcher 是引语提示语的倒装；by about 20% 增加约 20%。
